mano_cua.result_summary: Create repository 功能需要 GitHub OAuth 认证，OAuth 返回 404 无法登录。应用在未认证状态仅显示欢迎页和只读模式，Settings > GitHub 仅显示 'You're not signed in'，无 Create repository 入口。/select-repository 路由存在但被 allowlist 阻止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: App running in read-only mode. Create repository requires GitHub sign-in which returns 404. /select-repository route exists but inaccessible without auth. No Create repository UI accessible without authentication.
